key.name: window-maximized
key.description: Whether the main window of the application should open maximized or not.

key.name: notebooks
key.description: A list of uris to the root folders of notebooks.

key.name: expanded-directories
key.description: A list of uris to the directories that are currently expanded.

key.name: selected-notes-by-notebook
key.summary: List of selected notes by notebook.
key.description: A list of uris to the selected notes for each notebook.

key.name: tools-by-notebook-ids
key.summary: List of tools by notebook IDs.
key.description: A list of tool IDs for each notebook.

key.name: viewport-by-state-ids
key.summary: List of viewports by state IDs.
key.description: A list of viewport states for each state ID.
